vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is severely compromised. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/not visible. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as living specimens. P3 (Pothos) is present but in a state of advanced decay or total loss of foliage.

plant_audit.P1: No plant matter detected in the yellow pot.
plant_audit.P2: No viable plant matter detected in the black pot.
plant_audit.P3: The white rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is absent or reduced to non-viable organic debris.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dark, potentially saturated or hydrophobic; no signs of active growth.
biome_observations.surface_debris: Presence of a white rabbit figurine (P3 anchor), a metallic spoon (New Intervention), and a white cylindrical object (New Intervention/Tube).
biome_observations.fungal_presence: None observed, likely due to lack of organic host material.

temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Introduction of a metallic spoon into the P1/P2 area.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Significant reduction in ambient light or camera exposure; visual data becomes obscured.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Introduction of a white cylindrical object (tube) near the yellow pot; no recovery of plant life.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-functional. There is no evidence of photosynthesis or active plant tissue. The environment has transitioned from a botanical setup to a collection of inert objects and soil.
anomalies: Metallic spoon in P1/P2 pot area
White cylindrical tube in P1/P2 pot area
Total absence of expected botanical specimens
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a chronological audit of the provided image stack. My first step was to establish the baseline against the registry, followed by a pixel-by-pixel inspection of the soil surfaces. I validated my findings by cross-referencing the lack of chlorophyll-based signatures across all time steps. The biome has suffered a total systemic collapse. The plants are no longer present; the pots contain only soil and foreign objects (spoon, tube). The white rabbit anchor remains, but the Pothos it was meant to accompany is gone.
